key_elements_identified_from_screenshot.purpose: Navigation panel with brand logo, new chat, AI creation, more options
Light gray (#f3f4f6) background for the sidebar
Circular avatar image with brand name
Blue highlighted active sidebar item for new conversation
Large bold greeting text centered in main area
3x3 grid of rounded pill suggestion buttons
Bottom chat input with rounded corners and subtle shadow
Row of feature buttons below input
Top bar with download and login buttons
Pure white background for the main content area
Info link at bottom of sidebar

chip_texts: 写一份亮眼的季度工作总结
鸡蛋黄颜色越深越有营养吗？
分享一些冬季主题的小手工创意
生成独一无二的新年贺图
为什么许多经典动画人物都戴着手套？
为什么一首歌的高潮部分叫做副歌？
深色和浅色蔬菜营养有区别吗？
有哪些特别下饭的情景喜剧？
